Examples.Title: Get Voice
Examples.Code:
### Get Voice
# @name voices_get
GET {{host}}/voices/{{id}}?expand[]={{expand[]}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Cartesia-Version: 2026-03-01
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Update Voice
Examples.Description: Update the name, description, and gender of a voice. To set the gender back to the default, set the gender to `null`. If gender is not specified, the gender will not be updated.
Examples.Code:
### Update Voice
# @name voices_update
PATCH {{host}}/voices/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Cartesia-Version: 2026-03-01
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "gender": "masculine"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
